name: ai-health-assistant
description: AI Private Health Assistant — Local-first desktop health coach

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.start: npm run build:frontend && cd backend && npx tsx src/index.ts
